from django.core.management.base import BaseCommand

from Construtask.services_lgpd import executar_rotinas_anonimizacao, obter_resumo_rotinas_lgpd


class Command(BaseCommand):
    help = "Executa rotinas seguras de anonimizaÃ§Ã£o LGPD para cadastros inativos."

    def add_arguments(self, parser):
        parser.add_argument("--apply", action="store_true", help="Aplica efetivamente as rotinas.")

    def handle(self, *args, **options):
        if not options["apply"]:
            resumo = obter_resumo_rotinas_lgpd()
            self.stdout.write(self.style.WARNING("Modo simulacao: nenhuma alteracao foi aplicada."))
            self.stdout.write(f"Fornecedores inativos elegiveis: {resumo['fornecedores_inativos']}")
            self.stdout.write(f"Usuarios inativos elegiveis: {resumo['usuarios_inativos']}")
            self.stdout.write("Use --apply para executar as rotinas.")
            return

        resultado = executar_rotinas_anonimizacao()
        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS("Rotinas LGPD executadas com sucesso."))
        self.stdout.write(f"Fornecedores anonimizados: {resultado['fornecedores_anonimizados']}")
        self.stdout.write(f"Usuarios anonimizados: {resultado['usuarios_anonimizados']}")

ARQUIVO: C:\Users\ACER\Documents\New project\Construtask_2.0_restaurado\Construtask\management\commands\normalizar_textos_cadastrais.py
==============================

from django.apps import apps
from django.core.management.base import BaseCommand
from django.db import transaction

from Construtask.text_normalization import TEXT_NORMALIZATION_TARGETS, normalizar_texto_cadastral


class Command(BaseCommand):
    help = "Normaliza textos cadastrais jÃ¡ gravados no banco."

    def add_arguments(self, parser):
        parser.add_argument("--apply", action="store_true", help="Persiste as alteraÃ§Ãµes no banco.")

    def handle(self, *args, **options):
        apply_changes = options["apply"]
        total_fields = 0
        total_objects = 0

        with transaction.atomic():
            for label, fields in TEXT_NORMALIZATION_TARGETS.items():
                model = apps.get_model(label)
                changed_objects = 0
                changed_fields = 0
                for obj in model.objects.all().iterator():
                    updated_fields = []
                    for field_name in fields:
                        current = getattr(obj, field_name, None)
                        if not isinstance(current, str) or current == "":
                            continue
                        normalized = normalizar_texto_cadastral(current)
                        if normalized != current:
                            setattr(obj, field_name, normalized)
                            updated_fields.append(field_name)
                    if updated_fields:
                        changed_objects += 1
                        changed_fields += len(updated_fields)
                        if apply_changes:
                            obj.save(update_fields=updated_fields)
                if changed_objects:
                    self.stdout.write(f"{label}: {changed_objects} registros, {changed_fields} campos ajustados")
                    total_objects += changed_objects
                    total_fields += changed_fields
            if not apply_changes:
                transaction.set_rollback(True)

        action = "Aplicado" if apply_changes else "Simulado"
        self.stdout.write(self.style.SUCCESS(f"{action}: {total_objects} registros e {total_fields} campos normalizados"))

==============================

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {

    const contratoField = document.getElementById("id_contrato");

    if (!contratoField) return;

    contratoField.addEventListener("change", function () {

        const contratoId = this.value;

        if (!contratoId) return;

        fetch(`/admin/Construtask/medicao/buscar-contrato/${contratoId}/`)
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {

                document.getElementById("id_fornecedor").value = data.fornecedor || "";
                document.getElementById("id_cnpj").value = data.cnpj || "";
                document.getElementById("id_responsavel").value = data.responsavel || "";
                document.getElementById("id_valor_contrato").value = data.valor_contrato || "";

            });
    });

});

{% extends "admin/base_site.html" %}

{% block content %}
<h1>Curva ABC</h1>

<table border="1" cellpadding="5">
    <tr>
        <th>CÃ³digo</th>
        <th>DescriÃ§Ã£o</th>
        <th>Valor Total</th>
        <th>%</th>
        <th>% Acumulado</th>
        <th>Classe</th>
    </tr>

    {% for item in dados %}
    <tr>
        <td>{{ item.codigo }}</td>
        <td>{{ item.descricao }}</td>
        <td>{{ item.valor_total }}</td>
        <td>{{ item.percentual }}%</td>
        <td>{{ item.acumulado }}%</td>
        <td>{{ item.classe }}</td>
    </tr>
    {% endfor %}

</table>

{% endblock %}

{% extends "app/base.html" %}
{% load formatters %}

{% block content %}
<section class="page-shell">
    <div class="page-header">
        <div>
            <h1>{{ alerta.titulo }}</h1>
            <p>{{ alerta.codigo_regra }} â€¢ {{ alerta.referencia }}</p>
        </div>
        <div class="page-actions">
            <a class="btn btn-secondary" href="{% url 'alerta_operacional_list' %}">Voltar para a Central</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <section class="dashboard-grid dashboard-grid-2">
        <article class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3>Resumo do Alerta</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <table class="compact-table">
                    <tbody>
                        <tr><th>Obra</th><td>{{ alerta.obra }}</td></tr>
                        <tr><th>Regra</th><td class="code-cell">{{ alerta.codigo_regra }}</td></tr>
                        <tr><th>Severidade</th><td>{{ alerta.get_severidade_display }}</td></tr>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <td>
                                <span class="badge bg-{{ alerta|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ alerta.get_status_display }}</span>
                                <div><small class="text-muted">{{ alerta|workflow_stage_display }}</small></div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr><th>ResponsÃ¡vel</th><td>{{ alerta.responsavel|default:"NÃ£o informado" }}</td></tr>
                        <tr><th>Ãšltima aÃ§Ã£o</th><td>{% if alerta.ultima_acao_em %}{{ alerta.ultima_acao_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}{% else %}NÃ£o informado{% endif %}</td></tr>
                        <tr><th>Ãšltima aÃ§Ã£o por</th><td>{{ alerta.ultima_acao_por|default:"NÃ£o informado" }}</td></tr>
                        <tr><th>Data de referÃªncia</th><td>{% if alerta.data_referencia %}{{ alerta.data_referencia|date:"d/m/Y" }}{% else %}NÃ£o informado{% endif %}</td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </article>
        <article class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3>DescriÃ§Ã£o e EvidÃªncias</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <p>{{ alerta.descricao }}</p>
                {% if alerta.observacao_status %}
                <div class="info-box">
                    <strong>ObservaÃ§Ã£o atual</strong>
                    <p>{{ alerta.observacao_status }}</p>
                </div>
                {% endif %}
                {% if alerta.evidencias %}
                <table class="compact-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Campo</th>
                            <th>Valor</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for chave, valor in alerta.evidencias.items %}
                        <tr>
                            <td class="code-cell">{{ chave }}</td>
                            <td class="wrap-text">{{ valor }}</td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
                {% else %}
                <p class="empty">Nenhuma evidÃªncia complementar registrada.</p>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
        </article>
    </section>

    <section class="dashboard-grid dashboard-grid-3">
        {% if pode_assumir_alerta %}
        <article class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3>Assumir Tratamento</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <form method="post" action="{% url 'alerta_operacional_workflow' alerta.pk %}">
                    {% csrf_token %}
                    <input type="hidden" name="acao" value="assumir">
                    <input type="hidden" name="next" value="{{ request.path }}">
                    <label for="obs-assumir">ComentÃ¡rio</label>
                    <textarea id="obs-assumir" name="observacao" rows="4" placeholder="Ex.: Alerta assumido pela coordenaÃ§Ã£o para apuraÃ§Ã£o imediata."></textarea>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Assumir</button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </article>
        {% endif %}
        {% if pode_justificar_alerta %}
        <article class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3>Justificar</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <form method="post" action="{% url 'alerta_operacional_workflow' alerta.pk %}">
                    {% csrf_token %}
                    <input type="hidden" name="acao" value="justificar">
                    <input type="hidden" name="next" value="{{ request.path }}">
                    <label for="obs-justificar">Justificativa</label>
                    <textarea id="obs-justificar" name="observacao" rows="4" placeholder="Explique por que o alerta nÃ£o exige aÃ§Ã£o imediata."></textarea>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-secondary">Registrar Justificativa</button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </article>
        {% endif %}
        {% if pode_encerrar_alerta or pode_reabrir_alerta %}
        <article class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3>Encerrar ou Reabrir</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <form method="post" action="{% url 'alerta_operacional_workflow' alerta.pk %}">
                    {% csrf_token %}
                    <input type="hidden" name="acao" value="{% if alerta.status == 'ENCERRADO' %}reabrir{% else %}encerrar{% endif %}">
                    <input type="hidden" name="next" value="{{ request.path }}">
                    <label for="obs-encerrar">{% if alerta.status == 'ENCERRADO' %}ComentÃ¡rio de reabertura{% else %}ComentÃ¡rio de encerramento{% endif %}</label>
                    <textarea id="obs-encerrar" name="observacao" rows="4" placeholder="{% if alerta.status == 'ENCERRADO' %}Informe por que o alerta voltou para acompanhamento.{% else %}Informe a evidÃªncia utilizada para o encerramento.{% endif %}"></textarea>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn {% if alerta.status == 'ENCERRADO' %}btn-secondary{% else %}btn-primary{% endif %}">
                        {% if alerta.status == 'ENCERRADO' %}Reabrir Alerta{% else %}Encerrar Alerta{% endif %}
                    </button>
                </form>
            </div>
        </article>
        {% endif %}
    </section>

    <section class="card">
        <div class="card-header">
            <h3>HistÃ³rico do Alerta</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            {% if historico %}
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="compact-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th class="no-break-data">Data</th>
                            <th class="no-break-data">AÃ§Ã£o</th>
                            <th class="no-break-data">Status</th>
                            <th class="no-break-data">UsuÃ¡rio</th>
                            <th>ObservaÃ§Ã£o</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for item in historico %}
                        <tr>
                            <td class="no-break-data">{{ item.criado_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}</td>
                            <td class="no-break-data">{{ item.get_acao_display }}</td>
                            <td class="no-break-data">
                                {% if item.status_anterior %}{{ item.status_anterior }} â†’ {% endif %}{{ item.status_novo|default:"-" }}
                            </td>
                            <td class="no-break-data">{{ item.usuario|default:"Sistema" }}</td>
                            <td class="wrap-text">{{ item.observacao|default:"NÃ£o informado" }}</td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
            {% else %}
            <p class="empty">Nenhum histÃ³rico registrado para este alerta.</p>
            {% endif %}
        </div>
    </section>
</section>
{% endblock %}

{% extends "app/base.html" %}
{% load formatters %}

{% block extra_css %}
<style>
    .alerta-overview-row {
        margin-bottom: 18px;
    }
    .alerta-overview-row > [class*="col-"] {
        min-width: 0;
    }
    .alerta-overview-row .card {
        height: 100%;
        margin: 0;
    }
    .alerta-overview-row .card-body {
        padding: 16px 18px;
    }
    .alerta-filter-form {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)) auto;
        gap: 12px;
        align-items: end;
    }
    .alerta-filter-form label {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: 6px;
        margin: 0;
        min-width: 0;
    }
    .alerta-filter-form label span {
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
        letter-spacing: 0.04em;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: var(--color-muted);
    }
    .alerta-filter-form select {
        min-width: 0;
    }
    .alerta-filter-actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: 8px;
        align-items: center;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
    }
    .alerta-mini-table th,
    .alerta-mini-table td {
        padding: 10px 12px;
        font-size: 13px;
    }
    .alerta-main-table th,
    .alerta-main-table td {
        vertical-align: middle;
    }
    .alerta-main-table .muted {
        margin-top: 4px;
    }
    @media (max-width: 1280px) {
        .alerta-filter-form {
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
        }
    }
    @media (max-width: 820px) {
        .alerta-filter-form {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
    }
</style>
{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<section class="page-shell">
    <div class="page-header">
        <div>
            <h1>Central de Alertas Operacionais</h1>
            <p>Trate, justifique e acompanhe os alertas automÃ¡ticos da obra em um Ãºnico fluxo.</p>
        </div>
    </div>

    {% if sem_obra_selecionada %}
    <div class="card">
        <div class="card-body">
            <p class="empty">Selecione uma obra no topo do sistema para visualizar os alertas operacionais.</p>
        </div>
    </div>
    {% else %}
    <section class="row alerta-overview-row">
        <article class="col-md-6">
            <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3>Filtros</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <form method="get" class="alerta-filter-form">
                    <label>
                        <span>Status</span>
                        <select name="status">
                            <option value="">Todos</option>
                            <option value="ABERTO" {% if filtros.status == "ABERTO" %}selected{% endif %}>Aberto</option>
                            <option value="EM_TRATAMENTO" {% if filtros.status == "EM_TRATAMENTO" %}selected{% endif %}>Em Tratamento</option>
                            <option value="JUSTIFICADO" {% if filtros.status == "JUSTIFICADO" %}selected{% endif %}>Justificado</option>
                            <option value="ENCERRADO" {% if filtros.status == "ENCERRADO" %}selected{% endif %}>Encerrado</option>
                        </select>
                    </label>
                    <label>
                        <span>Severidade</span>
                        <select name="severidade">
                            <option value="">Todas</option>
                            <option value="CRITICA" {% if filtros.severidade == "CRITICA" %}selected{% endif %}>CrÃ­tica</option>
                            <option value="ALTA" {% if filtros.severidade == "ALTA" %}selected{% endif %}>Alta</option>
                            <option value="MEDIA" {% if filtros.severidade == "MEDIA" %}selected{% endif %}>MÃ©dia</option>
                            <option value="BAIXA" {% if filtros.severidade == "BAIXA" %}selected{% endif %}>Baixa</option>
                        </select>
                    </label>
                    <label>
                        <span>Regra</span>
                        <select name="regra">
                            <option value="">Todas</option>
                            {% for regra in regras_disponiveis %}
                            <option value="{{ regra }}" {% if filtros.regra == regra %}selected{% endif %}>{{ regra }}</option>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </select>
                    </label>
                    <div class="alerta-filter-actions">
                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Aplicar</button>
                        <a class="btn btn-secondary" href="{% url 'alerta_operacional_list' %}">Limpar</a>
                    </div>
                </form>
            </div>
            </div>
        </article>

        <article class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3>Resumo por Status</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                {% if resumo_status %}
                <table class="compact-table alerta-mini-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Status</th>
                            <th class="text-right no-break-data">Quantidade</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for item in resumo_status %}
                        <tr>
                            <td>{{ item.status_display }}</td>
                            <td class="text-right no-break-data">{{ item.total }}</td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
                {% else %}
                <p class="empty">Nenhum alerta consolidado para a obra.</p>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
            </div>
        </article>

        <article class="col-md-3">
            <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3>Resumo por Severidade</h3>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                {% if resumo_severidade %}
                <table class="compact-table alerta-mini-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Severidade</th>
                            <th class="text-right no-break-data">Quantidade</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for item in resumo_severidade %}
                        <tr>
                            <td>{{ item.severidade|capfirst }}</td>
                            <td class="text-right no-break-data">{{ item.total }}</td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
                {% else %}
                <p class="empty">Nenhuma severidade registrada.</p>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
            </div>
        </article>
    </section>

    <section class="card">
        <div class="card-header">
            <h3>Alertas da Obra</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body">
            {% if alertas %}
            <div class="table-responsive">
                <table class="compact-table alerta-main-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th class="no-break-data">Regra</th>
                            <th>DescriÃ§Ã£o</th>
                            <th class="no-break-data">Severidade</th>
                            <th class="no-break-data">Status</th>
                            <th class="no-break-data">ResponsÃ¡vel</th>
                            <th class="no-break-data">Atualizado em</th>
                            <th class="no-break-data">AÃ§Ãµes</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for alerta in alertas %}
                        <tr>
                            <td class="code-cell">{{ alerta.codigo_regra }}</td>
                            <td>
                                <a href="{% url 'alerta_operacional_detail' alerta.pk %}">{{ alerta.titulo }}</a>
                                <div class="muted">{{ alerta.referencia }}</div>
                            </td>
                            <td class="no-break-data">
                                <span class="badge {% if alerta.severidade == 'CRITICA' %}badge-danger{% elif alerta.severidade == 'ALTA' %}badge-warning{% elif alerta.severidade == 'MEDIA' %}badge-info{% else %}badge-secondary{% endif %}">
                                    {{ alerta.get_severidade_display }}
                                </span>
                            </td>
                            <td class="no-break-data">
                                <span class="badge bg-{{ alerta|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ alerta.get_status_display }}</span>
                                <div><small class="text-muted">{{ alerta|workflow_stage_display }}</small></div>
                            </td>
                            <td class="no-break-data">{{ alerta.responsavel|default:"NÃ£o informado" }}</td>
                            <td class="no-break-data">{{ alerta.atualizado_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}</td>
                            <td class="no-break-data actions-cell">
                                <a class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" href="{% url 'alerta_operacional_detail' alerta.pk %}">Detalhar</a>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
            {% else %}
            <p class="empty">Nenhum alerta encontrado com os filtros selecionados.</p>
            {% endif %}
        </div>
    </section>
    {% endif %}
</section>
{% endblock %}

{% load static formatters %}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <title>{% block title %}Construtask{% endblock %}</title>
    <style>
        :root {
            --black: #0b0b0c;
            --red-dark: #651111;
            --graphite: #2f343a;
            --graphite-soft: #434a53;
            --white: #ffffff;
            --border: #c9cdd2;
            --muted: #5e6772;
        }
        body { font-family: "Aptos", "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 15px; margin: 0; background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ededee 0%, #f7f7f7 100%); color: var(--black); }
        h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { color: var(--black); margin-top: 0; }
        a { color: var(--red-dark); }
        header { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--black) 0%, var(--graphite) 60%, var(--red-dark) 100%); color: var(--white); padding: 18px 32px 20px; border-bottom: 4px solid var(--red-dark); }
        .brand { display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:space-between; gap:24px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
        .brand img { max-width: 460px; width: 100%; height: auto; display:block; object-fit: contain; }
        .brand nav { padding-bottom: 10px; flex: 1 1 560px; }
        .nav-main { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px 14px; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:flex-end; }
        .nav-context { display:inline-flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; margin-right:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
        .nav-link { color: #e5e7eb; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 700; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 999px; transition: background .2s ease, color .2s ease; }
        .nav-link:hover { color: var(--white); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); }
        .nav-link.group { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12); }
        .nav-link.utility { font-weight: 600; }
        .nav-user { color:#d1d5db; font-weight:600; }
        .nav-divider { color:#9ca3af; }
        main { max-width: none; width: 100%; margin: 0; padding: 28px 18px 48px; box-sizing: border-box; }
        main.main-wide-left { max-width: none; margin: 0; padding-right: 24px; }
        main.main-full { max-width: none; width: 100%; margin: 0; padding: 28px 18px 48px; box-sizing: border-box; }
        .cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 18px; margin: 24px 0; width: 100%; }
        .grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 18px; margin: 24px 0; width: 100%; align-items: stretch; }
        .grid-2 > * { min-width: 0; }
        .card, .panel { background: var(--white); border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(11, 11, 12, 0.08); border: 1px solid #d5d8dc; box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; }
        .row > .card,
        .row > .panel,
        .row > [class*="col-"] > .card,
        .row > [class*="col-"] > .panel,
        .grid-2 > .card,
        .grid-2 > .panel,
        .container-fluid > .card,
        .container-fluid > .panel { height: 100%; }
        /* Painel: reduzir tamanho do card em ~2pt */
        .card strong { display: block; font-size: 1.43rem; margin-top: 8px; color: var(--red-dark); text-align: right; }

        .pie-wrap { display:flex; gap:18px; align-items:center; margin-top:6px; }
        .pie {
            width:160px;
            height:160px;
            border-radius:999px;
            background: conic-gradient(var(--pie-c1) 0 calc(var(--pie-p1) * 1%), var(--pie-c2) calc(var(--pie-p1) * 1%) 100%);
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            border: 10px solid #f0f1f3;
            box-sizing: content-box;
        }
        .pie-center {
            width:60px;
            height:60px;
            border-radius:999px;
            background: #ffffff;
            border: 1px solid #d5d8dc;
            display:flex;
            align-items:center;
            justify-content:center;
            font-weight:700;
            color: var(--graphite);
        }
        .pie-legend { display:grid; gap:8px; }
        .pie-legend .legend-item { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:12px; }
        .legend-dot { width:10px; height:10px; border-radius:999px; display:inline-block; margin-right:8px; }
        .toolbar { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; width: 100%; }
        .btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--red-dark); color: var(--white); padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 10px; text-decoration: none; border: 0; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; }
        .btn.secondary { background: var(--graphite); color: var(--white); }
        table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background: var(--white); border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; table-layout: auto; }
        th, td { padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; text-align: left; }
        th { background: #eef0f3; font-size: 0.82rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: var(--graphite); }
        form .field { margin-bottom: 16px; }
        form label { display: block; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 6px; }
        form input, form select, form textarea,
        .form-control, .form-select { width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); box-sizing: border-box; background: var(--white); color: var(--black); }
        form input:focus, form select:focus, form textarea:focus,
        .form-control:focus, .form-select:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: #874343;
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(101, 17, 17, 0.12);
        }
        .form-label { font-weight: 700; color: var(--graphite); }
        .actions { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 24px; }
        .empty { color: var(--muted); }
        .chart-row { margin-bottom: 16px; }
        .chart-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-weight:600; margin-bottom:6px; }
        .chart-track { width:100%; height:14px; border-radius:999px; background:#dddfe3; overflow:hidden; }
        .chart-fill { height:100%; border-radius:999px; }
        .tree-code { font-family: Consolas, monospace; color:var(--black); }
        .selector-display { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:10px 12px; border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:10px; background:var(--white); }
        .modal-backdrop { position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(11,11,12,.66); display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:20px; }
        .modal-backdrop.open { display:flex; }
        .modal { width:min(920px, 100%); max-height:80vh; overflow:auto; background:var(--white); border-radius:16px; padding:20px; box-shadow:0 24px 60px rgba(11,11,12,.35); border-top: 5px solid var(--red-dark); }
        .selector-list { border:1px solid #d8dbe0; border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden; margin-top:12px; }
        .selector-item { display:grid; grid-template-columns:36px 180px 1fr; gap:12px; padding:12px 16px; border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0; align-items:center; background:var(--white); }
        .selector-item:last-child { border-bottom:0; }
        .muted { color:var(--muted); }
        .synthetic td { font-weight: 700; color: var(--graphite); }
        .text-right { text-align: right !important; }
        .money { text-align: right !important; white-space: nowrap; }
        .numeric-input { text-align: right; }
        /* Controla a quebra de texto em blocos com textos longos. */
        .wrap-text { white-space: normal; word-break: break-word; line-height: 1.35; }
        /* Controla o comportamento padrÃ£o das tabelas compactas do sistema. */
        .compact-table { width: 100%; table-layout: auto; }
        /* Controla padding, quebra de texto e alinhamento das cÃ©lulas das listas. */
        .compact-table th, .compact-table td { padding: 12px 14px; vertical-align: top; white-space: normal; word-break: break-word; overflow-wrap: anywhere; line-height: 1.35; }
        /* Controla a altura visual e a leitura dos cabeÃ§alhos das listas. */
        .compact-table th { line-height: 1.25; }
        .detail-toggle { color: var(--red-dark); font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; }
        .detail-list { margin: 8px 0 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; }
        .detail-list li { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(180px, 1.2fr) 80px 100px 120px; gap: 12px; padding: 6px 0; border-top: 1px solid #eceff3; }
        .empty-row { display: none; }
        .table-actions { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-top: 12px; }
        .inline-note { margin-top: 10px; }
        .item-table select { max-width: 340px; }
        .messages { display:grid; gap:10px; margin-bottom:18px; }
        .message { padding:12px 14px; border-radius:12px; border:1px solid #d7dbe0; background:#ffffff; }
        .message.success { border-color:#8bb49a; background:#edf8f0; color:#1f5130; }
        .message.error { border-color:#d7a0a0; background:#fff1f1; color:#7f1d1d; }
        .container-fluid { width: 100%; max-width: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        .container-fluid > * { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; }
        .row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 18px; width: 100%; margin: 0 0 18px; align-items: stretch; }
        .row > [class*="col-"] { min-width: 0; }
        .col-md-1 { grid-column: span 1; }
        .col-md-2 { grid-column: span 2; }
        .col-md-3 { grid-column: span 3; }
        .col-md-4 { grid-column: span 4; }
        .col-md-5 { grid-column: span 5; }
        .col-md-6 { grid-column: span 6; }
        .col-md-7 { grid-column: span 7; }
        .col-md-8 { grid-column: span 8; }
        .col-md-9 { grid-column: span 9; }
        .col-md-10 { grid-column: span 10; }
        .col-md-11 { grid-column: span 11; }
        .col-md-12 { grid-column: span 12; }
        .d-flex { display: flex; }
        .justify-content-between { justify-content: space-between; }
        .justify-content-end { justify-content: flex-end; }
        .align-items-center { align-items: center; }
        .text-center { text-align: center; }
        .text-end { text-align: right; }
        .w-100 { width: 100%; }
        .mb-0 { margin-bottom: 0; }
        .mb-2 { margin-bottom: 8px; }
        .mb-3 { margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .mb-4 { margin-bottom: 18px; }
        .mt-2 { margin-top: 8px; }
        .mt-3 { margin-top: 12px; }
        .mt-4 { margin-top: 18px; }
        .py-3 { padding-top: 12px; padding-bottom: 12px; }
        .py-4 { padding-top: 16px; padding-bottom: 16px; }
        .alert {
            padding: 12px 14px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 1px solid #d7dbe0;
            background: #ffffff;
            margin-bottom: 14px;
        }
        .alert-info { background: #eef2f7; border-color: #b8c3cf; color: #253140; }
        .alert-warning { background: #fff5eb; border-color: #e7c9a4; color: #8a4b08; }
        .alert-danger, .alert-error { background: #fff1f1; border-color: #d7a0a0; color: #7f1d1d; }
        .alert-success { background: #edf8f0; border-color: #8bb49a; color: #1f5130; }
        .badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 700;
            white-space: nowrap;
            background: #e5e7eb;
            color: #111827;
        }
        .bg-primary { background: var(--graphite) !important; color: var(--white) !important; }
        .bg-secondary { background: #6b7280 !important; color: var(--white) !important; }
        .bg-success { background: #166534 !important; color: var(--white) !important; }
        .bg-warning { background: #b45309 !important; color: var(--white) !important; }
        .bg-danger { background: var(--red-dark) !important; color: var(--white) !important; }
        .bg-dark { background: var(--black) !important; color: var(--white) !important; }
        .bg-info { background: #374151 !important; color: var(--white) !important; }
        .btn-primary { background: var(--red-dark); color: var(--white); border: 0; }
        .btn-secondary { background: var(--graphite); color: var(--white); border: 0; }
        .btn-sm { padding: 7px 10px; font-size: 0.86rem; border-radius: 9px; }
        .btn-outline-secondary,
        .btn-outline-primary,
        .btn-outline-danger,
        .btn-outline-dark {
            background: var(--white);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--graphite);
        }
        .btn-outline-primary:hover,
        .btn-outline-secondary:hover,
        .btn-outline-danger:hover,
        .btn-outline-dark:hover {
            background: #f5f6f8;
        }
        .btn-outline-danger { color: var(--red-dark); border-color: #c8a7a7; }
        .btn-outline-dark { color: var(--black); border-color: #9ca3af; }
        .card-header {
            margin: -18px -18px 16px;
            padding: 14px 18px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f1f2f4 0%, #e6e8eb 100%);
            border-bottom: 1px solid #d5d8dc;
            border-top: 4px solid var(--red-dark);
            border-top-left-radius: 14px;
            border-top-right-radius: 14px;
        }
        .card-header h1, .card-header h2, .card-header h3, .card-header h4, .card-header h5, .card-header h6,
        .card-header .mb-0 { color: var(--black); margin: 0; }
        .card-body { padding: 0; }
        .table,
        .table-sm,
        .table-hover,
        .table-bordered { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background: var(--white); }
        .table th,
        .table td,
        .table-sm th,
        .table-sm td,
        .table-hover th,
        .table-hover td,
        .table-bordered th,
        .table-bordered td { padding: 12px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; vertical-align: top; }
        .table thead th,
        .table-sm thead th,
        .table-hover thead th,
        .table-bordered thead th { background: #eef0f3; color: var(--graphite); }
        .display-4 { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--red-dark); margin: 0; }
        .table-responsive { width: 100%; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: visible; }
        .table-responsive > table { min-width: 100%; }
        .border-primary { border-top: 4px solid var(--graphite) !important; }
        .border-secondary { border-top: 4px solid #6b7280 !important; }
        .border-success { border-top: 4px solid #166534 !important; }
        .border-warning { border-top: 4px solid #b45309 !important; }
        .border-danger { border-top: 4px solid var(--red-dark) !important; }
        .border-dark { border-top: 4px solid var(--black) !important; }
        .text-muted { color: var(--muted) !important; }
        .text-white { color: var(--white) !important; }
        .card-text { color: var(--graphite); margin: 0; }
        .g-3 { gap: 18px; }
        .code-cell,
        td.code-cell,
        th.code-cell,
        .compact-table td.code-cell,
        .compact-table th.code-cell,
        .table td.code-cell,
        .table th.code-cell,
        .tree-code { white-space: nowrap !important; word-break: normal !important; overflow-wrap: normal !important; }
        .no-break-data,
        td.no-break-data,
        th.no-break-data,
        .badge.no-break-data,
        .btn.no-break-data,
        .compact-table td.no-break-data,
        .compact-table th.no-break-data,
        .table td.no-break-data,
        .table th.no-break-data,
        .text-right.no-break-data,
        .text-end.no-break-data,
        td.text-right,
        td.text-end { white-space: nowrap !important; word-break: normal !important; overflow-wrap: normal !important; }
        input[name$='quantidade'],
        input[name$='valor_unitario'],
        input[name='valor_total'],
        input[name='valor_contratado'],
        input[name='valor_medido'] { text-align: right; }
        @media (max-width: 800px) {
            .grid-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
            .row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
            .row > [class*="col-"] { grid-column: span 1; }
            .selector-item { grid-template-columns: 36px 1fr; }
            .brand nav { padding-bottom: 0; }
            .detail-list li { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
            .nav-main { justify-content:flex-start; }
            .toolbar { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
        }
    </style>
    {% block extra_head %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body>
    <header>
        <div class="brand">
            <img src="{% static 'app/logo-construtask.png' %}" alt="Construtask">
            <nav>
                <div class="nav-main">
                    {% if user.is_authenticated %}
                    <form method="post" action="{% url 'selecionar_obra_contexto' %}" class="nav-context">
                        {% csrf_token %}
                        <input type="hidden" name="next" value="{{ request.get_full_path }}">
                        <select name="obra_contexto" style="min-width:220px; padding:6px 8px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #d1d5db;">
                            {% if not obras_contexto %}
                            <option value="">-- Selecione uma Obra --</option>
                            {% else %}
                            {% for obra_ctx in obras_contexto %}
                            <option value="{{ obra_ctx.pk }}"{% if obra_contexto_atual and obra_contexto_atual.pk == obra_ctx.pk %} selected{% endif %}>
                                {{ obra_ctx.codigo }} - {{ obra_ctx.nome }}
                            </option>
                            {% endfor %}
                            {% endif %}
                        </select>
                        <button type="submit" class="btn secondary" style="padding:7px 10px;">Aplicar</button>
                    </form>
                    {% endif %}
                    <a class="nav-link utility" href="{% url 'home' %}">Painel</a>
                    <a class="nav-link utility" href="{% url 'obra_list' %}">Obras</a>
                    <a class="nav-link group" href="{% url 'modulo_grupo' 'planejamento' %}">Planejamento</a>
                    <a class="nav-link group" href="{% url 'modulo_grupo' 'qualidade' %}">Qualidade</a>
                    <a class="nav-link group" href="{% url 'modulo_grupo' 'aquisicoes' %}">AquisiÃ§Ãµes</a>
                    <a class="nav-link group" href="{% url 'modulo_grupo' 'relatorios' %}">RelatÃ³rios</a>
                    <a class="nav-link group" href="{% url 'modulo_grupo' 'juridico' %}">JurÃ­dico</a>
                    <a class="nav-link group" href="{% url 'modulo_grupo' 'financeiro' %}">Financeiro</a>
                    {% if is_admin_empresa or is_admin_sistema %}
                    <a class="nav-link utility" href="{% url 'empresa_admin' %}">Gerenciar</a>
                    {% endif %}
                    {% if user.is_authenticated %}
                    <span class="nav-divider">|</span>
                    <span class="nav-user">{{ user.username }}</span>
                    <form method="post" action="{% url 'logout' %}" style="display:inline;">
                        {% csrf_token %}
                        <button type="submit" style="background:none; border:none; color:#fca5a5; cursor:pointer; font-weight:600; padding:0;">Sair</button>
                    </form>
                    {% endif %}
                </div>
            </nav>
        </div>
    </header>
    <main class="{% block main_class %}{% endblock %}">
        {% if messages %}
        <div class="messages">
            {% for message in messages %}
            <div class="message {{ message.tags }}">{{ message }}</div>
            {% endfor %}
        </div>
        {% endif %}
        {% block content %}{% endblock %}
    </main>
    <footer style="width:100%; max-width:none; margin:0 0 24px; padding:0 18px; color:#5e6772; font-size:0.92rem; box-sizing:border-box;">
        <div class="panel" style="box-shadow:none;">
            <strong style="display:block; margin-bottom:8px; color:#2f343a;">TransparÃªncia e Uso do Sistema</strong>
            <a href="{% url 'termos_uso' %}" style="margin-right:18px;">Termos de Uso</a>
            <a href="{% url 'politica_privacidade' %}">PolÃ­tica de Privacidade</a>
        </div>
    </footer>
    <script>
        (function () {
            function marcarCamposSemQuebra() {
                const patternData = /^(?:\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{2,4})(?:\s+\d{1,2}:\d{2}(?::\d{2})?)?$/;
                const patternPercentual = /^-?\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{3})*(?:,\d+)?%$/;
                const patternMoeda = /^(?:R\$\s*|\$\s*)?-?\d{1,3}(?:\.\d{3})*(?:,\d{2,})$/;
                const patternNumeroCurto = /^-?\d+(?:,\d+)?$/;
                const patternCodigo = /^(?=.*\d)[A-Z0-9]+(?:[.\-\/_][A-Z0-9]+)+$/i;
                const candidates = document.querySelectorAll(
                    "main td, main th, main .badge, main .chart-head span, main .selector-item span, main .card strong, main small, main p, main a, main button"
                );

                candidates.forEach((element) => {
                    const text = (element.textContent || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
                    if (!text || text.length > 40) {
                        return;
                    }
                    const hasCurrencyContext = /R\$|\$/.test(text) || element.classList.contains("money");
                    const hasPercentContext = /%/.test(text);
                    const hasDateContext = /\d{1,2}\/\d{1,2}\/\d{2,4}/.test(text);
                    if (
                        patternData.test(text) ||
                        patternPercentual.test(text) ||
                        (hasCurrencyContext && patternMoeda.test(text)) ||
                        (hasPercentContext && patternNumeroCurto.test(text.replace("%", ""))) ||
                        hasDateContext
                    ) {
                        element.classList.add("no-break-data");
                    }
                    if (patternCodigo.test(text) && text.length <= 40) {
                        element.classList.add("code-cell");
                    }
                });
            }

            if (document.readyState === "loading") {
                document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", marcarCamposSemQuebra);
            } else {
                marcarCamposSemQuebra();
            }
        })();
    </script>
    {% block extra_js %}{% endblock %}
</body>
</html>

{% extends "app/base.html" %}

{% block title %}Central de Evidencias | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>Central de Evidencias</h2>
        <p>Dossie consolidado de evidencias exportaveis da obra selecionada.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<section class="panel" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <form method="get" class="toolbar" style="justify-content:flex-start;">
        <select name="tipo">
            <option value=""{% if not tipo_filtro %} selected{% endif %}>Todos</option>
            <option value="contrato"{% if tipo_filtro == "contrato" %} selected{% endif %}>Contratos</option>
            <option value="medicao"{% if tipo_filtro == "medicao" %} selected{% endif %}>Medicoes</option>
            <option value="baseline"{% if tipo_filtro == "baseline" %} selected{% endif %}>Baselines</option>
        </select>
        <button class="btn" type="submit">Filtrar</button>
    </form>
</section>

<section class="panel">
    {% if obra_contexto %}
        {% if evidencias %}
        <table class="compact-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Tipo</th>
                    <th>Identificador</th>
                    <th>Referencia</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Valor</th>
                    <th>Aprovacao</th>
                    <th>Parecer</th>
                    <th>Exportar</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for evidencia in evidencias %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ evidencia.tipo }}</td>
                    <td>{{ evidencia.identificador }}</td>
                    <td>{{ evidencia.referencia }}</td>
                    <td>{{ evidencia.status }}</td>
                    <td>{{ evidencia.valor }}</td>
                    <td>{{ evidencia.responsavel }}</td>
                    <td>{{ evidencia.parecer }}</td>
                    <td>
                        <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
                            <a href="{{ evidencia.pdf_url }}">PDF</a>
                            <a href="{{ evidencia.excel_url }}">Excel</a>
                        </div>
                    </td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">Nenhuma evidencia encontrada para o filtro selecionado.</p>
        {% endif %}
    {% else %}
    <p class="empty">Selecione uma obra para acessar o dossie de evidencias.</p>
    {% endif %}
</section>
{% endblock %}

{% extends "app/base.html" %}

{% block title %}{{ titulo }} | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>{{ titulo }}</h2>
    </div>
</div>

<section class="panel">
    <form method="post">
        {% csrf_token %}
        {% for field in form %}
            {% if field.name != "centro_custo" %}
            <div class="field">
                <label for="{{ field.id_for_label }}">{{ field.label }}</label>
                {{ field }}
                {% if field.errors %}
                    <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-top:6px;">{{ field.errors }}</div>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
            {% endif %}
        {% endfor %}

        {{ form.centro_custo }}

        {% if form.non_field_errors %}
            <div style="color:#b91c1c;">{{ form.non_field_errors }}</div>
        {% endif %}

        <div class="field">
            <label>Itens da Compra ou ContrataÃ§Ã£o</label>
            {{ item_formset.management_form }}
            {% if item_formset.non_form_errors %}
                <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-bottom:10px;">{{ item_formset.non_form_errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
            <table class="compact-table item-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Centro de Custo</th>
                        <th>Unidade</th>
                        <th class="text-right">Quantidade</th>
                        <th class="text-right">Valor UnitÃ¡rio</th>
                        <th>Excluir</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody id="itens-compromisso-body">
                    {% for item_form in item_formset %}
                    <tr{% if not item_form.instance.pk and forloop.counter0 > 0 and not item_form.errors %} class="empty-row"{% endif %}>
                        <td>
                            {{ item_form.id }}
                            {{ item_form.centro_custo }}
                            {{ item_form.centro_custo.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td>{{ item_form.unidade }}{{ item_form.unidade.errors }}</td>
                        <td class="text-right">{{ item_form.quantidade }}{{ item_form.quantidade.errors }}</td>
                        <td class="text-right">{{ item_form.valor_unitario }}{{ item_form.valor_unitario.errors }}</td>
                        <td>{% if item_form.instance.pk %}{{ item_form.DELETE }}{% endif %}</td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
            <div class="table-actions">
                <button type="button" class="btn secondary" id="adicionar-item-compromisso">Adicionar Centro de Custo</button>
                <p class="muted inline-note">A unidade serÃ¡ carregada automaticamente do plano de contas.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="actions">
            <button class="btn" type="submit">Salvar</button>
            <a class="btn secondary" href="{{ voltar_url }}">Voltar</a>
        </div>
    </form>
</section>

<template id="item-compromisso-empty-form">
    <tr>
        <td>
            {{ item_formset.empty_form.id }}
            {{ item_formset.empty_form.centro_custo }}
        </td>
        <td>{{ item_formset.empty_form.unidade }}</td>
        <td class="text-right">{{ item_formset.empty_form.quantidade }}</td>
        <td class="text-right">{{ item_formset.empty_form.valor_unitario }}</td>
        <td></td>
    </tr>
</template>

<script>
(() => {
    const totalForms = document.getElementById("id_itens-TOTAL_FORMS");
    const tbody = document.getElementById("itens-compromisso-body");
    const addButton = document.getElementById("adicionar-item-compromisso");
    const template = document.getElementById("item-compromisso-empty-form");

    function extrairUnidade(select) {
        const texto = select.options[select.selectedIndex]?.textContent || "";
        const match = texto.match(/\[(.+)\]$/);
        return match ? match[1] : "";
    }

    function preencherUnidade(row) {
        const select = row.querySelector("select");
        const unidadeInput = row.querySelector("input[name$='unidade']");
        if (!select || !unidadeInput) return;
        unidadeInput.value = extrairUnidade(select);
    }

    function bindRow(row) {
        const select = row.querySelector("select");
        if (!select || select.dataset.bound === "true") return;
        select.dataset.bound = "true";
        select.addEventListener("change", () => preencherUnidade(row));
        preencherUnidade(row);
    }

    function bindAllRows() {
        Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll("tr")).forEach(bindRow);
    }

    function showHiddenRow() {
        const hiddenRow = tbody.querySelector(".empty-row");
        if (!hiddenRow) return false;
        hiddenRow.classList.remove("empty-row");
        bindRow(hiddenRow);
        return true;
    }

    addButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (showHiddenRow()) {
            return;
        }

        const index = Number(totalForms.value);
        const html = template.innerHTML.replaceAll("__prefix__", index);
        tbody.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", html);
        totalForms.value = index + 1;
        bindAllRows();
    });

    bindAllRows();
})();
</script>
{% endblock %}

{% extends "app/base.html" %}
{% load formatters %}

{% block main_class %}main-full{% endblock %}
{% block title %}Compras e Contratacoes | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>Compras e Contratacoes</h2>
        <p>Contratos e pedidos com visao operacional por obra.</p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:10px;">
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'compromisso_export' %}?q={{ busca|urlencode }}">Exportar Excel</a>
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'compromisso_lista_pdf' %}?q={{ busca|urlencode }}">Exportar PDF</a>
        <a class="btn" href="{% url 'compromisso_create' %}">Nova Compra ou Contratacao</a>
    </div>
</div>

<section class="panel" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <form method="get" class="toolbar" style="justify-content:flex-start; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <input type="text" name="q" value="{{ busca }}" placeholder="Buscar por numero, fornecedor, nome, descricao ou CNPJ" style="max-width:360px;">
        <input type="text" name="fornecedor" value="{{ fornecedor_filtro }}" placeholder="Fornecedor" style="max-width:220px;">
        <input type="text" name="responsavel" value="{{ responsavel_filtro }}" placeholder="Responsavel" style="max-width:200px;">
        <input type="date" name="data_inicio" value="{{ data_inicio }}" style="max-width:170px;">
        <input type="date" name="data_fim" value="{{ data_fim }}" style="max-width:170px;">
        <select name="obra" style="max-width:220px;">
            <option value="">Todas as obras</option>
            {% for obra in obras %}
            <option value="{{ obra.pk }}"{% if obra_filtro == obra.pk|stringformat:"s" %} selected{% endif %}>{{ obra.codigo }} - {{ obra.nome }}</option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
        <select name="centro_custo" style="max-width:280px;">
            <option value="">Todos os centros de custo</option>
            {% for centro in centros_custo %}
            <option value="{{ centro.pk }}"{% if centro_custo_filtro == centro.pk|stringformat:"s" %} selected{% endif %}>{{ centro.codigo }} - {{ centro.descricao }}</option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
        <select name="status" style="max-width:220px;">
            <option value="">Todos os status</option>
            {% for value, label in status_choices %}
            <option value="{{ value }}"{% if status_filtro == value %} selected{% endif %}>{{ label }}</option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
        <button class="btn" type="submit">Filtrar</button>
    </form>
</section>

{% if compromissos %}
<table class="compact-table">
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th>Numero</th>
            <th>Obra</th>
            <th>Status</th>
            <th>Tipo</th>
            <th>CNPJ</th>
            <th>Fornecedor</th>
            <th>Descricao</th>
            <th class="text-right">Valor Total</th>
            <th class="text-right">Valor Executado</th>
            <th class="text-right">Saldo</th>
            <th>Acoes</th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        {% for compromisso in compromissos %}
        <tr>
            <td>
                <a href="{% url 'contrato_detail' compromisso.pk %}">{{ compromisso.numero }}</a>
              </td>
            <td>{% if compromisso.obra %}{{ compromisso.obra.codigo }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td>
            <td>
              <span class="badge bg-{{ compromisso|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ compromisso.get_status_display }}</span>
              <div><small class="text-muted">{{ compromisso|workflow_stage_display }}</small></div>
            </td>
            <td>{{ compromisso.get_tipo_display }}</td>
            <td>{{ compromisso.cnpj }}</td>
            <td>{{ compromisso.fornecedor }}</td>
            <td class="wrap-text">{{ compromisso.descricao }}</td>
            <td class="money">{{ compromisso.valor_contratado|money_br }}</td>
            <td class="money">{{ compromisso.valor_executado|money_br }}</td>
            <td class="money">{{ compromisso.saldo|money_br }}</td>
            <td>
                <div style="display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center;">
                    <a href="{% url 'compromisso_update' compromisso.pk %}">Editar</a>
                    <form method="post" action="{% url 'compromisso_delete' %}" onsubmit="return confirm('Excluir este registro?');" style="display:inline;">
                        {% csrf_token %}
                        <input type="hidden" name="id" value="{{ compromisso.pk }}">
                        <button type="submit" style="background:none; border:0; color:#651111; cursor:pointer; padding:0;">Excluir</button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </td>
        </tr>
        {% endfor %}
    </tbody>
</table>
{% else %}
<p class="empty">Nenhuma compra ou contratacao cadastrada.</p>
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}

ARQUIVO: C:\Users\ACER\Documents\New project\Construtask_2.0_restaurado\Construtask\templates\app\contrato_detail.html
==============================

{% extends "app/base.html" %}
{% load formatters %}

{% block main_class %}main-full{% endblock %}
{% block title %}{{ contrato.get_tipo_display }} {{ contrato.numero }} | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>{{ contrato.get_tipo_display }} {{ contrato.numero }}</h2>
        <p>Visao consolidada do registro e sua execucao.</p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:10px;">
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'compromisso_pdf' contrato.pk %}">Gerar PDF</a>
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'compromisso_aprovacao_pdf' contrato.pk %}">RelatÃ³rio ProbatÃ³rio</a>
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'compromisso_aprovacao_excel' contrato.pk %}">RelatÃ³rio ProbatÃ³rio Excel</a>
        {% if contrato.status == "RASCUNHO" %}
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'compromisso_update' contrato.pk %}">Editar</a>
        {% endif %}
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'compromisso_list' %}">Voltar</a>
    </div>
</div>

<section class="panel" style="margin-bottom:18px;">
    <div style="display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <div>
            <strong>Workflow de AprovaÃ§Ã£o</strong>
            <p class="muted" style="margin:6px 0 0 0;">Funcao atual: {{ papel_aprovacao|default:"Nao configurada" }} | Alcada: {{ limite_aprovacao_label }}</p>
        </div>
        <div style="min-width:min(100%, 420px);">
            <form method="post">
                {% csrf_token %}
                <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:10px;">
                    <label for="id_parecer_aprovacao_contrato">Parecer</label>
                    <textarea id="id_parecer_aprovacao_contrato" name="parecer_aprovacao" rows="3" placeholder="Opcional no envio/aprovacao e obrigatorio na devolucao para ajuste.">{{ contrato.parecer_aprovacao }}</textarea>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
                    {% if pode_enviar_para_aprovacao and contrato.status == "RASCUNHO" %}
                    <button type="submit" class="btn" name="acao" value="enviar_para_aprovacao">Enviar para AprovaÃ§Ã£o</button>
                    {% endif %}
                    {% if pode_aprovar and contrato.status == "EM_APROVACAO" %}
                    <button type="submit" class="btn" name="acao" value="aprovar">Aprovar</button>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn secondary" name="acao" value="retornar_para_ajuste">Retornar para Ajuste</button>
                    {% endif %}
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="cards">
    <div class="card"><span>Obra</span><strong style="text-align:left;">{% if contrato.obra %}{{ contrato.obra.codigo }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</strong></div>
    <div class="card"><span>Status</span><strong style="text-align:left;">{{ contrato.get_status_display }}</strong><small class="text-muted">{{ contrato|workflow_stage_display }}</small></div>
    <div class="card"><span>Valor Contratado</span><strong>{{ contrato.valor_contratado|money_br }}</strong></div>
    <div class="card"><span>Valor Executado</span><strong>{{ contrato.valor_executado|money_br }}</strong></div>
    <div class="card"><span>Saldo</span><strong>{{ contrato.saldo|money_br }}</strong></div>
    <div class="card"><span>% Executado</span><strong>{{ saldo_percentual|trunc2 }}%</strong></div>
</section>

<section class="grid-2">
    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Dados do Contrato</h3>
        <table class="compact-table">
            <tbody>
                <tr><td>Fornecedor</td><td>{{ contrato.fornecedor }}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>CNPJ</td><td>{{ contrato.cnpj }}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Descricao</td><td>{{ contrato.descricao }}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Estrutura</td><td>{{ contrato.torre|default:"-" }} / {{ contrato.bloco|default:"-" }} / {{ contrato.etapa|default:"-" }}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Responsavel</td><td>{{ contrato.responsavel }}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Data</td><td>{{ contrato.data_assinatura|date:"d/m/Y" }}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Enviado para AprovaÃ§Ã£o</td><td>{% if contrato.enviado_para_aprovacao_por %}{{ contrato.enviado_para_aprovacao_por.username }} em {{ contrato.enviado_para_aprovacao_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Aprovado por</td><td>{% if contrato.aprovado_por %}{{ contrato.aprovado_por.username }} em {{ contrato.aprovado_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td></tr>
                <tr><td>Ãšltimo Parecer</td><td>{{ contrato.parecer_aprovacao|default:"-" }}</td></tr>
                {% if origem_aquisicao %}
                <tr><td>Solicitacao de Compra</td><td><a href="{% url 'solicitacao_compra_detail' origem_aquisicao.solicitacao.pk %}">{{ origem_aquisicao.solicitacao.numero }}</a></td></tr>
                <tr><td>Cotacao de Origem</td><td><a href="{% url 'cotacao_detail' origem_aquisicao.cotacao_aprovada.pk %}">{{ origem_aquisicao.cotacao_aprovada.numero }}</a></td></tr>
                {% endif %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Anexos</h3>
        <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            {% csrf_token %}
            {% for field in anexo_form %}
            <div class="field">
                <label for="{{ field.id_for_label }}">{{ field.label }}</label>
                {{ field }}
            </div>
            {% endfor %}
            <div class="actions">
                <button type="submit" class="btn">Incluir Anexo</button>
            </div>
        </form>
        {% if contrato.anexos.all %}
        <ul>
            {% for anexo in contrato.anexos.all %}
            <li>{{ anexo.descricao }}{% if anexo.arquivo %} - <a href="{{ anexo.arquivo.url }}">arquivo</a>{% endif %}</li>
            {% endfor %}
        </ul>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>

<section class="grid-2">
    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Itens Contratados</h3>
        <table class="compact-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Centro de Custo</th>
                    <th>Descricao Tecnica</th>
                    <th class="text-right">Quantidade</th>
                    <th>Unidade</th>
                    <th class="text-right">Valor Unitario</th>
                    <th class="text-right">Valor Total</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for item in contrato.itens.all %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ item.centro_custo.codigo }} - {{ item.centro_custo.descricao }}</td>
                    <td class="wrap-text">{{ item.descricao_tecnica|default:"-" }}</td>
                    <td class="money">{{ item.quantidade|trunc2 }}</td>
                    <td>{{ item.unidade|default:"-" }}</td>
                    <td class="money">{{ item.valor_unitario|money_br }}</td>
                    <td class="money">{{ item.valor_total|money_br }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Historico</h3>
        {% if contrato.historicos.all %}
        <table class="compact-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Data</th>
                    <th>AÃ§Ã£o</th>
                    <th>UsuÃ¡rio</th>
                    <th>DescriÃ§Ã£o</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for item in contrato.historicos.all|slice:":12" %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ item.criado_em|date:"d/m/Y" }}</td>
                    <td>{{ item.acao }}</td>
                    <td>{{ item.usuario.username|default:"-" }}</td>
                    <td>{{ item.descricao }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">Nenhum historico registrado.</p>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>

{% if contrato.tipo == "CONTRATO" %}
<section class="panel" style="margin-top:18px;">
    <h3>Aditivos</h3>
    {% if aditivos %}
    <table class="compact-table">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>Tipo</th>
                <th>Descricao</th>
                <th>Status</th>
                <th>Motivo</th>
                <th class="text-right">Delta/Valor</th>
                <th>Data</th>
                <th>Workflow</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            {% for aditivo in aditivos %}
            <tr>
                <td>{{ aditivo.get_tipo_display }}</td>
                <td class="wrap-text">{{ aditivo.descricao|default:"-" }}</td>
                <td>
                    <span class="badge bg-{{ aditivo|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ aditivo.get_status_display }}</span>
                    <div><small class="text-muted">{{ aditivo|workflow_stage_display }}</small></div>
                </td>
                <td class="wrap-text">{{ aditivo.motivo_mudanca|default:"-" }}</td>
                <td class="money text-right">
                    {% if aditivo.tipo == "PRAZO" %}
                        {{ aditivo.delta_dias }}
                        dias
                    {% else %}
                        {{ aditivo.itens.all|length }} item(s)
                    {% endif %}
                </td>
                <td>{{ aditivo.criado_em|date:"d/m/Y" }}</td>
                <td class="wrap-text">
                    <div class="muted" style="margin-bottom:8px;">
                        Enviado: {{ aditivo.enviado_para_aprovacao_por.username|default:"-" }} em {{ aditivo.enviado_para_aprovacao_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i"|default:"-" }}<br>
                        Aprovado: {{ aditivo.aprovado_por.username|default:"-" }} em {{ aditivo.aprovado_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i"|default:"-" }}
                        <br>Solicitado: {{ aditivo.solicitado_por.username|default:"-" }} em {{ aditivo.solicitado_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i"|default:"-" }}
                        {% if aditivo.impacto_resumido %}
                        <br>Impacto: {{ aditivo.impacto_resumido }}
                        {% endif %}
                        {% if aditivo.parecer_aprovacao %}
                        <br>Parecer: {{ aditivo.parecer_aprovacao }}
                        {% endif %}
                    </div>
                    <form method="post" action="{% url 'aditivo_contrato_workflow' aditivo.pk %}">
                        {% csrf_token %}
                        <input type="text" name="parecer_aprovacao" placeholder="Parecer da aprovaÃ§Ã£o" style="width:100%; margin-bottom:6px;">
                        <div style="display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap;">
                            {% if aditivo.status == "RASCUNHO" and pode_enviar_para_aprovacao %}
                            <button class="btn secondary" type="submit" name="acao" value="enviar_para_aprovacao">Enviar</button>
                            {% endif %}
                            {% if aditivo.status == "EM_APROVACAO" and pode_aprovar_aditivo_workflow %}
                            <button class="btn" type="submit" name="acao" value="aprovar">Aprovar</button>
                            <button class="btn secondary" type="submit" name="acao" value="retornar_para_ajuste">Devolver</button>
                            {% endif %}
                        </div>
                    </form>
                </td>
            </tr>
            {% if aditivo.tipo != "PRAZO" %}
            <tr>
                <td colspan="6" class="muted">
                    {% for item in aditivo.itens.all %}
                        {{ item.centro_custo.codigo }} - {{ item.centro_custo.descricao }}: {{ item.valor|money_br }}{% if not forloop.last %} | {% endif %}
                    {% empty %}
                        -
                    {% endfor %}
                </td>
            </tr>
            {% endif %}
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
    {% else %}
    <p class="empty">Nenhum aditivo registrado.</p>
    {% endif %}

    <form method="post" action="{% url 'aditivo_contrato_create' contrato.pk %}" style="margin-top:18px;">
        {% csrf_token %}

        <div class="field">
            <label for="{{ aditivo_form.tipo.id_for_label }}">Tipo</label>
            {{ aditivo_form.tipo }}
            {% if aditivo_form.tipo.errors %}
                <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-top:6px;">{{ aditivo_form.tipo.errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
        </div>

        <div class="field">
            <label for="{{ aditivo_form.descricao.id_for_label }}">Descricao</label>
            {{ aditivo_form.descricao }}
            {% if aditivo_form.descricao.errors %}
                <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-top:6px;">{{ aditivo_form.descricao.errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
        </div>

        <div class="field">
            <label for="{{ aditivo_form.motivo_mudanca.id_for_label }}">Motivo da Mudanca</label>
            {{ aditivo_form.motivo_mudanca }}
            {% if aditivo_form.motivo_mudanca.errors %}
                <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-top:6px;">{{ aditivo_form.motivo_mudanca.errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
        </div>

        <div class="field">
            <label for="{{ aditivo_form.impacto_resumido.id_for_label }}">Impacto Resumido</label>
            {{ aditivo_form.impacto_resumido }}
            {% if aditivo_form.impacto_resumido.errors %}
                <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-top:6px;">{{ aditivo_form.impacto_resumido.errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
        </div>

        <div class="field">
            <label for="{{ aditivo_form.delta_dias.id_for_label }}">Delta de dias (apenas para PRAZO)</label>
            {{ aditivo_form.delta_dias }}
            {% if aditivo_form.delta_dias.errors %}
                <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-top:6px;">{{ aditivo_form.delta_dias.errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
        </div>

        <div class="field">
            <label>Itens do Aditivo (Valor/Escopo)</label>
            {{ aditivo_item_formset.management_form }}
            {% if aditivo_item_formset.non_form_errors %}
                <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-bottom:10px;">{{ aditivo_item_formset.non_form_errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
            <table class="compact-table item-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Centro de Custo</th>
                        <th class="text-right">Valor</th>
                        <th>Excluir</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    {% for item_form in aditivo_item_formset %}
                    <tr{% if not item_form.instance.pk and forloop.counter0 > 0 and not item_form.errors %} class="empty-row"{% endif %}>
                        <td>
                            {{ item_form.id }}
                            {{ item_form.centro_custo }}
                            {{ item_form.centro_custo.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td class="text-right">
                            {{ item_form.valor }}{{ item_form.valor.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            {% if item_form.instance.pk %}
                                {{ item_form.DELETE }}
                            {% endif %}
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        {% if aditivo_form.non_field_errors %}
            <div style="color:#b91c1c; margin-bottom:10px;">{{ aditivo_form.non_field_errors }}</div>
        {% endif %}

        <div class="actions">
            <button class="btn" type="submit">Incluir Aditivo</button>
            <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'contrato_detail' contrato.pk %}">Atualizar</a>
        </div>
    </form>
</section>
{% endif %}

<section class="grid-2">
    <div class="panel">
        <h3>{% if contrato.tipo == "CONTRATO" %}Medicoes{% else %}Execucao do Pedido{% endif %}</h3>
        {% if medicoes_contrato %}
        <table class="compact-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Numero</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Descricao</th>
                    <th class="text-right">Valor</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for medicao in medicoes_contrato %}
                <tr>
                    <td><a href="{% url 'medicao_detail' medicao.pk %}">{{ medicao.numero_da_medicao }}</a></td>
                    <td>
                        <span class="badge bg-{{ medicao|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ medicao.get_status_display }}</span>
                        <div><small class="text-muted">{{ medicao|workflow_stage_display }}</small></div>
                    </td>
                    <td>{{ medicao.descricao }}</td>
                    <td class="money">{{ medicao.valor_medido|money_br }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">{% if contrato.tipo == "CONTRATO" %}Nenhuma medicao registrada.{% else %}Este pedido nao possui medicoes; a execucao ocorre diretamente pelas notas fiscais vinculadas.{% endif %}</p>
        {% endif %}
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Notas Vinculadas</h3>
        {% if notas_contrato %}
        <table class="compact-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Numero</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Descricao</th>
                    <th class="text-right">Valor</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for nota in notas_contrato %}
                <tr>
                    <td>{{ nota.numero }}</td>
                    <td>
                        <span class="badge bg-{{ nota|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ nota.get_status_display }}</span>
                        <div><small class="text-muted">{{ nota|workflow_stage_display }}</small></div>
                    </td>
                    <td>{{ nota.descricao }}</td>
                    <td class="money">{{ nota.valor_total|money_br }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">Nenhuma nota vinculada.</p>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>
{% endblock %}
