                        {% if form.impacto.errors %}
                        <div class="text-danger">{{ form.impacto.errors }}</div>
                        {% endif %}
                        <small class="text-muted">1=Insignificante a 5=CatastrÃ³fico</small>
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-4">
                        <label class="form-label">NÃ­vel (calculado)</label>
                        <div class="alert alert-{% if risco and risco.nivel_texto == 'BAIXO' %}success{% elif risco and risco.nivel_texto == 'MÃ‰DIO' %}warning{% elif risco and risco.nivel_texto == 'ALTO' %}danger{% else %}dark{% endif %} mb-0">
                            <h4 class="mb-0">{{ risco.nivel|default:'-' }}</h4>
                            <small>{{ risco.get_probabilidade_display }} Ã— {{ risco.get_impacto_display }}</small>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <hr>

                <div class="mb-3">
                    <label class="form-label">Plano de Resposta</label>
                    {{ form.plano_resposta }}
                    <small class="text-muted">EstratÃ©gia e aÃ§Ãµes para mitigar o risco</small>
                </div>

                <div class="row mb-3">
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <label class="form-label">ResponsÃ¡vel *</label>
                        {{ form.responsavel }}
                        {% if form.responsavel.errors %}
                        <div class="text-danger">{{ form.responsavel.errors }}</div>
                        {% endif %}
                    </div>
                    <div class="col-md-6">
                        <label class="form-label">Data Meta para Tratamento</label>
                        {{ form.data_meta_tratamento }}
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="mb-3">
                    <label class="form-label">ObservaÃ§Ãµes</label>
                    {{ form.observacoes }}
                </div>

                <div class="d-flex justify-content-between">
                    <a href="{% if voltar_url %}{{ voltar_url }}{% else %}{% url 'risco_list' %}{% endif %}" class="btn btn-secondary">Cancelar</a>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                        <i class="bi bi-save"></i> Salvar
                    </button>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

## Arquivo: Construtask/templates/app/risco_list.html

`$ext
{% extends "app/base.html" %}
{% load formatters %}

{% block main_class %}main-full{% endblock %}
{% block title %}Riscos | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>Gestao de Riscos</h2>
        <p>Registro, classificacao e tratamento dos riscos operacionais, de prazo, qualidade e custo da obra.</p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:10px;">
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'risco_dashboard' %}">Dashboard</a>
        <a class="btn" href="{% url 'risco_create' %}">Novo Risco</a>
    </div>
</div>

<section class="cards">
    <div class="card"><span>Total de Riscos</span><strong>{{ total_riscos }}</strong></div>
    <div class="card"><span>Riscos Ativos</span><strong>{{ riscos_ativos }}</strong></div>
    <div class="card"><span>Riscos Criticos</span><strong>{{ riscos_criticos }}</strong></div>
    <div class="card"><span>Em Tratamento</span><strong>{{ riscos_em_tratamento }}</strong></div>
    <div class="card"><span>Fechados</span><strong>{{ riscos_fechados }}</strong></div>
    <div class="card"><span>Categoria Prazo</span><strong>{{ riscos_prazo }}</strong></div>
</section>

<section class="panel">
    <form method="get" class="filters-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr auto; gap:12px; align-items:end;">
        <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:0;">
            <label for="id_q">Busca</label>
            <input id="id_q" type="text" name="q" value="{{ busca }}" placeholder="Titulo, descricao, processo, EAP">
        </div>
        <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:0;">
            <label for="id_status">Status</label>
            <select id="id_status" name="status">
                <option value="">Todos</option>
                {% for value, label in status_choices %}
                <option value="{{ value }}" {% if status_filtro == value %}selected{% endif %}>{{ label }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
            </select>
        </div>
        <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:0;">
            <label for="id_categoria">Categoria</label>
            <select id="id_categoria" name="categoria">
                <option value="">Todas</option>
                {% for value, label in categoria_choices %}
                <option value="{{ value }}" {% if categoria_filtro == value %}selected{% endif %}>{{ label }}</option>
                {% endfor %}
            </select>
        </div>
        <div class="field" style="margin-bottom:0;">
            <label for="id_nivel">Nivel</label>
            <select id="id_nivel" name="nivel">
                <option value="">Todos</option>
                <option value="BAIXO" {% if nivel_filtro == "BAIXO" %}selected{% endif %}>Baixo</option>
                <option value="MEDIO" {% if nivel_filtro == "MEDIO" %}selected{% endif %}>Medio</option>
                <option value="ALTO" {% if nivel_filtro == "ALTO" %}selected{% endif %}>Alto</option>
                <option value="CRITICO" {% if nivel_filtro == "CRITICO" %}selected{% endif %}>Critico</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <div class="actions" style="margin:0;">
            <button class="btn secondary" type="submit">Filtrar</button>
        </div>
    </form>
</section>

<section class="panel">
    {% if riscos %}
    <table class="compact-table">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>Nivel</th>
                <th>Titulo</th>
                <th>Categoria</th>
                <th>Processo</th>
                <th>EAP</th>
                <th>Status</th>
                <th>Responsavel</th>
                <th>Meta</th>
                <th>Acoes</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            {% for risco in riscos %}
            <tr>
                <td>
                    <span class="badge" style="background:
                    {% if risco.nivel_texto == 'BAIXO' %}#166534
                    {% elif risco.nivel_texto == 'MÃ‰DIO' %}#a16207
                    {% elif risco.nivel_texto == 'ALTO' %}#991b1b
                    {% else %}#111827{% endif %};
                    color:#fff; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:999px;">
                        {{ risco.nivel }} - {{ risco.nivel_texto }}
                    </span>
                </td>
                <td><a href="{% url 'risco_detail' risco.pk %}">{% if risco.codigo %}{{ risco.codigo }} - {% endif %}{{ risco.titulo }}</a></td>
                <td>{{ risco.get_categoria_display }}</td>
                <td>{{ risco.processo|default:"-" }}</td>
                <td>{% if risco.plano_contas %}{{ risco.plano_contas.codigo }} - {{ risco.plano_contas.descricao }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td>
                <td>
                    <span class="badge bg-{{ risco|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ risco.get_status_display }}</span>
                </td>
                <td>{{ risco.responsavel.username }}</td>
                <td>{% if risco.data_meta_tratamento %}{{ risco.data_meta_tratamento|date:"d/m/Y" }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td>
                <td>
                    <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'risco_detail' risco.pk %}">Abrir</a>
                </td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
    {% else %}
    <p class="empty">Nenhum risco encontrado para o contexto atual.</p>
    {% endif %}
</section>
{% endblock %}
```

## Arquivo: Construtask/templates/app/solicitacao_compra_detail.html

`$ext
{% extends "app/base.html" %}
{% load formatters %}

{% block main_class %}main-full{% endblock %}
{% block title %}Detalhe da Solicitacao | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>{{ solicitacao.numero }}</h2>
        <p>{{ solicitacao.titulo }} | <span class="badge bg-{{ solicitacao|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ solicitacao.get_status_display }}</span> <small class="text-muted">{{ solicitacao|workflow_stage_display }}</small></p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:10px;">
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'solicitacao_compra_pdf' solicitacao.pk %}">Gerar PDF</a>
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'cotacao_create' %}?solicitacao={{ solicitacao.pk }}">Nova Cotacao</a>
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'solicitacao_compra_list' %}">Voltar</a>
    </div>
</div>

<section class="grid-2">
    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Dados da solicitacao</h3>
        <table class="compact-table">
            <tbody>
                <tr><th>Obra</th><td>{{ solicitacao.obra.codigo }} - {{ solicitacao.obra.nome }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Centro de custo principal</th><td>{% if solicitacao.plano_contas %}{{ solicitacao.plano_contas.codigo }} - {{ solicitacao.plano_contas.descricao }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Solicitante</th><td>{{ solicitacao.solicitante }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Data</th><td>{{ solicitacao.data_solicitacao|date:"d/m/Y" }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Descricao</th><td class="wrap-text">{{ solicitacao.descricao|default:"-" }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Observacoes</th><td class="wrap-text">{{ solicitacao.observacoes|default:"-" }}</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Workflow e Relacionamentos</h3>
        <table class="compact-table">
            <tbody>
                <tr><th>Status</th><td><span class="badge bg-{{ solicitacao|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ solicitacao.get_status_display }}</span> <small class="text-muted">{{ solicitacao|workflow_stage_display }}</small></td></tr>
                <tr><th>Enviado para aprovacao</th><td>{% if solicitacao.enviado_para_aprovacao_por %}{{ solicitacao.enviado_para_aprovacao_por.username }} em {{ solicitacao.enviado_para_aprovacao_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Aprovado por</th><td>{% if solicitacao.aprovado_por %}{{ solicitacao.aprovado_por.username }} em {{ solicitacao.aprovado_em|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Ultimo parecer</th><td>{{ solicitacao.parecer_aprovacao|default:"-" }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th>Valor estimado</th><td>{{ solicitacao.valor_estimado_total|money_br }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th class="text-right">Cotacoes</th><td class="money">{{ solicitacao.cotacoes.count }}</td></tr>
                <tr><th class="text-right">Resultados em Compras e Contratacoes</th><td class="money">{{ compromissos_resultantes|length }}</td></tr>
            </tbody>
        </table>
        <form method="post" style="margin-top:12px;">
            {% csrf_token %}
            <div class="field">
                <label for="id_parecer_aprovacao_solicitacao">Parecer</label>
                <textarea id="id_parecer_aprovacao_solicitacao" name="parecer_aprovacao" rows="3" placeholder="Opcional no envio/aprovaÃ§Ã£o e obrigatÃ³rio na devoluÃ§Ã£o para ajuste.">{{ solicitacao.parecer_aprovacao }}</textarea>
            </div>
            <div class="actions">
                {% if pode_enviar_para_aprovacao and solicitacao.status == "RASCUNHO" %}
                <button type="submit" class="btn" name="acao" value="enviar_para_aprovacao">Enviar para AprovaÃ§Ã£o</button>
                {% endif %}
                {% if pode_aprovar and solicitacao.status == "EM_APROVACAO" %}
                <button type="submit" class="btn" name="acao" value="aprovar">Aprovar</button>
                <button type="submit" class="btn secondary" name="acao" value="retornar_para_ajuste">Retornar para Ajuste</button>
                {% endif %}
            </div>
        </form>
    </div>
</section>

<section class="grid-2">
    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Cotacoes Vinculadas</h3>
        {% if solicitacao.cotacoes.all %}
        <table class="compact-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Numero</th>
                    <th>Fornecedor</th>
                    <th>Status</th>
                    <th>Data</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for cotacao in solicitacao.cotacoes.all %}
                <tr>
                    <td><a href="{% url 'cotacao_detail' cotacao.pk %}">{{ cotacao.numero }}</a></td>
                    <td>{{ cotacao.fornecedor }}</td>
                    <td>
                        <span class="badge bg-{{ cotacao|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ cotacao.get_status_display }}</span>
                        <div><small class="text-muted">{{ cotacao|workflow_stage_display }}</small></div>
                    </td>
                    <td>{{ cotacao.data_cotacao|date:"d/m/Y" }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">Ainda nao ha cotacoes vinculadas.</p>
        {% endif %}
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
        <h3>Compras e Contratacoes Geradas</h3>
        {% if compromissos_resultantes %}
        <table class="compact-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Numero</th>
                    <th>Tipo</th>
                    <th>Fornecedor</th>
                    <th class="text-right">Valor</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for compromisso in compromissos_resultantes %}
                <tr>
                    <td><a href="{% url 'contrato_detail' compromisso.pk %}">{{ compromisso.numero }}</a></td>
                    <td>{{ compromisso.get_tipo_display }}</td>
                    <td>{{ compromisso.fornecedor }}</td>
                    <td class="money">{{ compromisso.valor_contratado|money_br }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>
        {% else %}
        <p class="empty">Nenhum contrato ou pedido gerado a partir desta solicitacao.</p>
        {% endif %}
    </div>
</section>

<section class="panel">
    <h3>Itens</h3>
    {% if solicitacao.itens.all %}
    <table class="compact-table">
        <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Centro de Custo</th>
                    <th>Descricao Tecnica</th>
                    <th>Unidade</th>
                    <th class="text-right">Quantidade</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
            {% for item in solicitacao.itens.all %}
            <tr>
                <td>{{ item.plano_contas.codigo }} - {{ item.plano_contas.descricao }}</td>
                <td class="wrap-text">{{ item.descricao_tecnica|default:"-" }}</td>
                <td>{{ item.unidade|default:"-" }}</td>
                <td class="money">{{ item.quantidade|trunc2 }}</td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
    {% else %}
    <p class="empty">Ainda nao ha itens cadastrados para esta solicitacao.</p>
    {% endif %}
</section>

<section class="panel">
    <h3>Linha do Tempo</h3>
    {% if workflow_events %}
    <table class="compact-table">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>Data/Hora</th>
                <th>Acao</th>
                <th>Usuario</th>
                <th>Resumo</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            {% for evento in workflow_events %}
            <tr>
                <td>{{ evento.timestamp|date:"d/m/Y H:i" }}</td>
                <td>{{ evento.get_acao_display }}</td>
                <td>{{ evento.usuario|default:"Nao informado" }}</td>
                <td>{{ evento.entidade_label }}</td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
    {% else %}
    <p class="empty">Nenhum evento de auditoria registrado.</p>
    {% endif %}
</section>
{% endblock %}
```

## Arquivo: Construtask/templates/app/solicitacao_compra_form.html

`$ext
{% extends "app/base.html" %}

{% block title %}Solicitacao de Compra | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="panel" style="max-width:1200px;">
    <h2>Nova Solicitacao de Compra</h2>
    <p>Registre a demanda inicial com os centros de custo e os itens tecnicos que serao enviados para cotacao.</p>
    <form method="post">
        {% csrf_token %}
        {% for field in form %}
        <div class="field">
            <label for="{{ field.id_for_label }}">{{ field.label }}</label>
            {{ field }}
            {% if field.errors %}
            <div class="message error" style="margin-top:8px;">{{ field.errors|striptags }}</div>
            {% endif %}
        </div>
        {% endfor %}

        <div class="field">
            <label>Itens da Solicitacao</label>
            {{ item_formset.management_form }}
            {% if item_formset.non_form_errors %}
            <div class="message error" style="margin-bottom:10px;">{{ item_formset.non_form_errors }}</div>
            {% endif %}
            <table class="compact-table item-table" id="solicitacao-itens-table">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>Centro de Custo</th>
                        <th>Descricao Tecnica</th>
                        <th>Unidade</th>
                        <th class="text-right">Quantidade</th>
                        <th>Excluir</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    {% for item_form in item_formset %}
                    <tr class="solicitacao-item-row">
                        <td>
                            {{ item_form.id }}
                            {{ item_form.plano_contas }}
                            {{ item_form.plano_contas.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            {{ item_form.descricao_tecnica }}
                            {{ item_form.descricao_tecnica.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            {{ item_form.unidade }}
                            {{ item_form.unidade.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td class="text-right">
                            {{ item_form.quantidade }}
                            {{ item_form.quantidade.errors }}
                        </td>
                        <td>
                            {% if item_form.instance.pk %}
                                {{ item_form.DELETE }}
                            {% else %}
                                <input type="checkbox" disabled>
                            {% endif %}
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endfor %}
                </tbody>
            </table>
            <div class="actions" style="margin-top:12px;">
                <button class="btn secondary" type="button" id="add-solicitacao-item">Adicionar Centro de Custo</button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="actions">
            <button class="btn" type="submit">Salvar</button>
            <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'solicitacao_compra_list' %}">Voltar</a>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>

<template id="solicitacao-item-empty-row">
    <tr class="solicitacao-item-row">
        <td>
            __ID_FIELD__
            __PLANO__
        </td>
        <td>__DESCRICAO__</td>
        <td>__UNIDADE__</td>
        <td class="text-right">__QUANTIDADE__</td>
        <td><input type="checkbox" disabled></td>
    </tr>
</template>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const addButton = document.getElementById("add-solicitacao-item");
    const totalForms = document.getElementById("id_itens-TOTAL_FORMS");
    const tbody = document.querySelector("#solicitacao-itens-table tbody");
    const template = document.getElementById("solicitacao-item-empty-row").innerHTML;
    const emptyForm = {
        idField: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.id }}{% endfilter %}`,
        plano: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.plano_contas }}{% endfilter %}`,
        descricao: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.descricao_tecnica }}{% endfilter %}`,
        unidade: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.unidade }}{% endfilter %}`,
        quantidade: `{% filter escapejs %}{{ item_formset.empty_form.quantidade }}{% endfilter %}`,
    };

    addButton.addEventListener("click", function () {
        const index = Number(totalForms.value);
        let html = template
            .replace("__ID_FIELD__", emptyForm.idField.replace(/__prefix__/g, index))
            .replace("__PLANO__", emptyForm.plano.replace(/__prefix__/g, index))
            .replace("__DESCRICAO__", emptyForm.descricao.replace(/__prefix__/g, index))
            .replace("__UNIDADE__", emptyForm.unidade.replace(/__prefix__/g, index))
            .replace("__QUANTIDADE__", emptyForm.quantidade.replace(/__prefix__/g, index));
        tbody.insertAdjacentHTML("beforeend", html);
        totalForms.value = index + 1;
    });
});
</script>
{% endblock %}
```

## Arquivo: Construtask/templates/app/solicitacao_compra_list.html

`$ext
{% extends "app/base.html" %}
{% load formatters %}

{% block main_class %}main-full{% endblock %}
{% block title %}Solicitacoes de Compra | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>Solicitacoes de Compra</h2>
        <p>Primeira etapa do fluxo estruturado de aquisicoes.</p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:8px;">
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'solicitacao_compra_export' %}">Exportar Excel</a>
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'solicitacao_compra_lista_pdf' %}">Exportar PDF</a>
        <a class="btn" href="{% url 'solicitacao_compra_create' %}">Nova Solicitacao</a>
    </div>
  </div>

<div class="panel">
    {% if solicitacoes %}
    <table class="compact-table">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>Numero</th>
                <th>Obra</th>
                <th>Titulo</th>
                <th>Centro de Custo</th>
                <th>Solicitante</th>
                <th>Status</th>
                <th>Data</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            {% for solicitacao in solicitacoes %}
            <tr>
                <td><a href="{% url 'solicitacao_compra_detail' solicitacao.pk %}">{{ solicitacao.numero }}</a></td>
                <td>{{ solicitacao.obra.codigo }}</td>
                <td>{{ solicitacao.titulo }}</td>
                <td>{% if solicitacao.plano_contas %}{{ solicitacao.plano_contas.codigo }} - {{ solicitacao.plano_contas.descricao }}{% else %}-{% endif %}</td>
                <td>{{ solicitacao.solicitante }}</td>
                <td>
                    <span class="badge bg-{{ solicitacao|workflow_badge_class }}">{{ solicitacao.get_status_display }}</span>
                </td>
                <td>{{ solicitacao.data_solicitacao|date:"d/m/Y" }}</td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
    {% else %}
    <p class="empty">Nenhuma solicitacao registrada.</p>
    {% endif %}
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

{% extends "app/base.html" %}

{% block title %}Termos de Uso | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>Termos de Uso</h2>
        <p>Condicoes gerais de uso do Construtask para operacao profissional de obras, contratos, medicoes e controles gerenciais.</p>
    </div>
</div>

<section class="panel" style="margin-bottom:20px;">
    <h3>Uso Autorizado</h3>
    <p>O acesso ao sistema e restrito a usuarios autorizados pela organizacao responsavel, com perfis, obras e alÃ§adas compatÃ­veis com sua funÃ§Ã£o operacional.</p>
</section>

<section class="panel" style="margin-bottom:20px;">
    <h3>Responsabilidade e Rastreabilidade</h3>
    <p>As operacoes podem gerar trilhas de auditoria, registros de aprovacao, logs de acesso e evidencias documentais para fins de controle interno, auditoria, seguranca da informacao e defesa juridica.</p>
</section>

<section class="panel">
    <h3>Boas Praticas</h3>
    <p>Os usuarios devem utilizar o sistema exclusivamente para fins profissionais, preservando confidencialidade, integridade das informacoes e conformidade com normas internas, contratuais e legais aplicaveis.</p>
</section>
{% endblock %}
```

## Arquivo: Construtask/templates/app/usuario_empresa_list.html

`$ext
{% extends "app/base.html" %}
{% load formatters %}

{% block main_class %}main-full{% endblock %}
{% block title %}Usuarios da Empresa | Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="toolbar">
    <div>
        <h2>Usuarios da Empresa</h2>
        <p>Gerencie os usuarios da empresa {{ empresa.nome }} e suas permissoes de acesso.</p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:10px;">
        {% if is_admin_sistema %}
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'usuario_empresa_create' %}">Novo Usuario</a>
        {% endif %}
        <a class="btn secondary" href="{% url 'home' %}">Voltar</a>
    </div>
</div>

{% if messages %}
<div class="messages">
    {% for message in messages %}
    <div class="message {{ message.tags }}">{{ message }}</div>
    {% endfor %}
</div>
{% endif %}

<section class="panel" style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
    <h3>{{ empresa.nome }}</h3>
    <p>CNPJ: {{ empresa.cnpj }}</p>
    {% if empresas %}
    <form method="get" style="margin-top: 12px;">
        <label for="empresa">Filtrar por empresa:</label>
        <select name="empresa" id="empresa" onchange="this.form.submit()">
            <option value="">-- Selecione --</option>
            {% for emp in empresas %}
            <option value="{{ emp.pk }}"{% if emp.pk == empresa.pk %} selected{% endif %}>{{ emp.nome }}</option>
            {% endfor %}
        </select>
    </form>
    {% endif %}
</section>

<section class="panel">
    <div class="toolbar">
        <h3>Usuarios Cadastrados ({{ usuarios_empresa.count }})</h3>
    </div>
    
    {% if usuarios_empresa %}
    <table>
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>Usuario</th>
                <th>Email</th>
                <th>Tipo</th>
                <th>Obras Permitidas</th>
                <th>Acoes</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            {% for ue in usuarios_empresa %}
            <tr>
                <td><strong>{{ ue.usuario.username }}</strong></td>
                <td>{{ ue.usuario.email|default:"-" }}</td>
                <td>
                    {% if ue.is_admin_empresa %}
                    <span style="color: #059669; font-weight: 600;">Admin da Empresa</span>
                    {% else %}
                    <span style="color: #6b7280;">Usuario</span>
                    {% endif %}
                </td>
                <td>
                    {% if ue.is_admin_empresa %}
                    <span style="color: #059669;">Todas as obras da empresa</span>
                    {% else %}
                    {{ ue.obras_permitidas.count }} obra(s)
                    {% endif %}
                </td>
                <td>
                    {% if not ue.is_admin_empresa %}
                    <form method="post" style="display:inline-flex; gap:8px; align-items:center;">
                        {% csrf_token %}
                        <input type="hidden" name="usuario_empresa_id" value="{{ ue.pk }}">
                        <select name="obras" multiple style="min-width:200px; height: 60px;">
                            {% for obra in obras_da_empresa %}
                            <option value="{{ obra.pk }}"{% if obra in ue.obras_permitidas.all %} selected{% endif %}>
                                {{ obra.codigo }} - {{ obra.nome }}
                            </option>
                            {% endfor %}
                        </select>
                        <button type="submit" class="btn secondary" style="padding: 6px 12px;">Atualizar</button>
                    </form>
                    {% else %}
                    <span style="color: #9ca3af; font-style: italic;">Admin - acesso total</span>
                    {% endif %}
                </td>
            </tr>
            {% endfor %}
        </tbody>
    </table>
    {% else %}
    <p class="empty">Nenhum usuario cadastrado para esta empresa.</p>
    {% endif %}
</section>
{% endblock %}
```

## Arquivo: Construtask/templates/registration/login.html

`$ext
{% extends 'app/base.html' %}
{% load static %}

{% block title %}Login - Construtask{% endblock %}

{% block content %}
<div class="container">
    <div class="row justify-content-center mt-5">
        <div class="col-md-4">
            <div class="card shadow">
                <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white text-center">
                    <h4><i class="fas fa-hard-hat"></i> Construtask</h4>
                    <p class="mb-0 small">Sistema de Gestao de Obras</p>
                </div>
                <div class="card-body">
                    {% if form.errors %}
                        <div class="alert alert-danger">
                            <strong>Erro!</strong> Usuario ou senha invalidos.
                        </div>
                    {% endif %}

                    <form method="post">
                        {% csrf_token %}
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label for="id_username" class="form-label">Usuario</label>
                            <input type="text" name="username" id="id_username"
                                   class="form-control" required autofocus>
                        </div>
                        <div class="mb-3">
                            <label for="id_password" class="form-label">Senha</label>
                            <input type="password" name="password" id="id_password"
                                   class="form-control" required>
                        </div>
                        <div class="mb-3 form-check">
                            <input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input" id="id_remember">
                            <label class="form-check-label" for="id_remember">
                                Lembrar-me
                            </label>
                        </div>
                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-100">
                            <i class="fas fa-sign-in-alt"></i> Entrar
                        </button>
                    </form>
                </div>
                <div class="card-footer text-center">
                    <small class="text-muted">Sistema de gestao construtiva</small>
                    <div style="margin-top:8px;">
                        <a href="{% url 'termos_uso' %}">Termos de Uso</a> |
                        <a href="{% url 'politica_privacidade' %}">Politica de Privacidade</a>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}
```

## Arquivo: Construtask/templatetags/formatters.py

`$ext
from decimal import Decimal, InvalidOperation, ROUND_DOWN

from django import template

from Construtask.status_semantics import get_status_badge_class, get_status_stage_label

register = template.Library()


@register.filter
def trunc2(value):
    if value in (None, ""):
        return "0,00"

    try:
        decimal_value = Decimal(str(value))
    except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError):
        return value

    decimal_value = decimal_value.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_DOWN)
    return f"{decimal_value:.2f}".replace(".", ",")


@register.filter
def money_br(value):
    if value in (None, ""):
        value = Decimal("0")

    try:
        decimal_value = Decimal(str(value))
    except (InvalidOperation, ValueError, TypeError):
        return value

    decimal_value = decimal_value.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_DOWN)
    sinal = "-" if decimal_value < 0 else ""
    decimal_value = abs(decimal_value)
    inteiro, fracao = f"{decimal_value:.2f}".split(".")
    inteiro_formatado = f"{int(inteiro):,}".replace(",", ".")
    return f"{sinal}$ {inteiro_formatado},{fracao}"


@register.filter
def workflow_badge_class(value):
    return get_status_badge_class(value)


@register.filter
def workflow_stage_display(value):
    return get_status_stage_label(value)
```

It exposes the ASGI callable as a module-level variable named ``application``.

from django.core.asgi import get_asgi_application

os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'setup.settings')

application = get_asgi_application()

## Arquivo: setup/settings.py

`$ext
"""
Django settings for setup project.

Generated by 'django-admin startproject' using Django 6.0.2.

For more information on this file, see
https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/6.0/topics/settings/

For the full list of settings and their values, see
https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/6.0/ref/settings/
"""

from pathlib import Path
import os

import dj_database_url
from django.core.exceptions import ImproperlyConfigured

# Build paths inside the project like this: BASE_DIR / 'subdir'.
BASE_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent


# Quick-start development settings - unsuitable for production
# See https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/6.0/howto/deployment/checklist/

# SECURITY WARNING: keep the secret key used in production secret!
_secret_key_env = os.environ.get("DJANGO_SECRET_KEY")

# SECURITY WARNING: don't run with debug turned on in production!
_debug_env = os.environ.get("DJANGO_DEBUG")
# Local (sem DATABASE_URL): default DEBUG=True. ProduÃ§Ã£o/railway: siga DJANGO_DEBUG (ou False).
if _debug_env is None and not os.environ.get("DATABASE_URL"):
    DEBUG = True
else:
    DEBUG = (_debug_env or "False").lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"}

if _secret_key_env:
    SECRET_KEY = _secret_key_env
elif DEBUG:
    SECRET_KEY = "django-insecure-development-key"
else:
    raise ImproperlyConfigured("Defina DJANGO_SECRET_KEY em ambiente nao local.")
ALLOWED_HOSTS = [
    host.strip()
    for host in os.environ.get("ALLOWED_HOSTS", "127.0.0.1,localhost").split(",")
    if host.strip()
]


# Application definition

INSTALLED_APPS = [
    'django.contrib.admin',
    'django.contrib.auth',
    'django.contrib.contenttypes',
    'django.contrib.sessions',
    'django.contrib.messages',
    'django.contrib.staticfiles',
    'Construtask',
    "mptt"
]

MIDDLEWARE = [
    'django.middleware.security.SecurityMiddleware',
    'whitenoise.middleware.WhiteNoiseMiddleware',
    'django.contrib.sessions.middleware.SessionMiddleware',
    'django.middleware.locale.LocaleMiddleware',
    'django.middleware.common.CommonMiddleware',
    'django.middleware.csrf.CsrfViewMiddleware',
    'django.contrib.auth.middleware.AuthenticationMiddleware',
    'django.contrib.messages.middleware.MessageMiddleware',
    'django.middleware.clickjacking.XFrameOptionsMiddleware',
    'Construtask.audit.AuditMiddleware',
    'Construtask.auth_middleware.LoginRequiredMiddleware',
]


ROOT_URLCONF = 'setup.urls'

TEMPLATES = [
    {
        'BACKEND': 'django.template.backends.django.DjangoTemplates',
        'DIRS': [],
        'APP_DIRS': True,
        'OPTIONS': {
            'context_processors': [
                'django.template.context_processors.request',
                'django.contrib.auth.context_processors.auth',
                'django.contrib.messages.context_processors.messages',
                'Construtask.context_processors.obra_contexto',
                'Construtask.context_processors.user_permissoes',
            ],
        },
    },
]

WSGI_APPLICATION = 'setup.wsgi.application'

if os.environ.get("DATABASE_URL"):
    
    # Ambiente Railway / ProduÃ§Ã£o
    DATABASES = {
        "default": dj_database_url.parse(
            os.environ.get("DATABASE_URL"),
            conn_max_age=600
        )
    }

else:

    # Ambiente local (SQLite)
    DATABASES = {
        "default": {
            "ENGINE": "django.db.backends.sqlite3",
            "NAME": BASE_DIR / "db.sqlite3",
        }
    }


# Password validation
# https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/6.0/ref/settings/#auth-password-validators

AUTH_PASSWORD_VALIDATORS = [
    {
        'NAME': 'django.contrib.auth.password_validation.UserAttributeSimilarityValidator',
    },
    {
        'NAME': 'django.contrib.auth.password_validation.MinimumLengthValidator',
    },
    {
        'NAME': 'django.contrib.auth.password_validation.CommonPasswordValidator',
    },
    {
        'NAME': 'django.contrib.auth.password_validation.NumericPasswordValidator',
    },
]


# Internationalization
# https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/6.0/topics/i18n/

LANGUAGE_CODE = 'pt-br'
TIME_ZONE = "America/Sao_Paulo"


USE_I18N = True
USE_L10N = True
USE_TZ = True

USE_THOUSAND_SEPARATOR = True
THOUSAND_SEPARATOR = '.'
DECIMAL_SEPARATOR = ','


# Static files (CSS, JavaScript, Images)
# https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/6.0/howto/static-files/

STATIC_URL = "/static/"
STATIC_ROOT = BASE_DIR / "staticfiles"
MEDIA_URL = "/media/"
MEDIA_ROOT = BASE_DIR / "media"

STATICFILES_DIRS = []

STATICFILES_STORAGE = "whitenoise.storage.CompressedManifestStaticFilesStorage"

DEFAULT_AUTO_FIELD = "django.db.models.BigAutoField"


# Auth settings
LOGIN_URL = 'login'
LOGIN_REDIRECT_URL = 'obra_list'
LOGOUT_REDIRECT_URL = 'login'


# Session settings
SESSION_COOKIE_AGE = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7  # 7 dias
SESSION_SAVE_EVERY_REQUEST = True
SESSION_COOKIE_HTTPONLY = True
SESSION_COOKIE_SAMESITE = "Lax"
CSRF_COOKIE_SAMESITE = "Lax"
SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE = not DEBUG
CSRF_COOKIE_SECURE = not DEBUG
SECURE_CONTENT_TYPE_NOSNIFF = True
X_FRAME_OPTIONS = "DENY"
SECURE_REFERRER_POLICY = "same-origin"

if not DEBUG:
    SECURE_HSTS_SECONDS = int(os.environ.get("SECURE_HSTS_SECONDS", "3600"))
    SECURE_HSTS_INCLUDE_SUBDOMAINS = os.environ.get("SECURE_HSTS_INCLUDE_SUBDOMAINS", "False").lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"}
    SECURE_HSTS_PRELOAD = os.environ.get("SECURE_HSTS_PRELOAD", "False").lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"}
    SECURE_SSL_REDIRECT = os.environ.get("SECURE_SSL_REDIRECT", "True").lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"}
```

## Arquivo: setup/urls.py

`$ext
from django.conf import settings
from django.conf.urls.static import static
from django.contrib import admin
from django.urls import include, path

urlpatterns = [
    path("", include("Construtask.urls")),
    path("admin/", admin.site.urls),
]

if settings.DEBUG:
    urlpatterns += static(settings.MEDIA_URL, document_root=settings.MEDIA_ROOT)
```

## Arquivo: setup/wsgi.py

`$ext
"""
WSGI config for setup project.

It exposes the WSGI callable as a module-level variable named ``application``.

For more information on this file, see
https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/6.0/howto/deployment/wsgi/
"""

import os

from django.core.wsgi import get_wsgi_application

os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE', 'setup.settings')

application = get_wsgi_application()
```
